children.name: Multi-pass retrieval surfaced 3 follow-u
children.characters: Multi-pass retrieval surfaced 3 follow-up works citing the method within six weeks of the preprint.

children.name: The appendix ablation (table 4) attribut
children.characters: The appendix ablation (table 4) attributes most of the gain to the SE(3) noise schedule, not model size.

children.characters: Reported wall-clock cost is ~11 GPU-h to reproduce the headline benchmark on a single A100.

children.name: Versioning/diff between successive resea
children.characters: Versioning/diff between successive research generations (after a reprocess) is not specified in the ground truth — this viewer shows the latest generation and a “stale” badge only. Tracked for the design backlog.
